text: Exam Technique @ msiincanis | @ s e If it's your first exam, assume you will run out of time * The way to succeed is to be efficient ¢ 2 minutes to read Q, Answers and make a decision e Don’t guess until the end .. later questions may remind you of something important from earlier... e Use the Mark for Review !! * Take ALL the practice tests you can e ... aim for 90%+ before you do the real exam
